iot.topicrule.iotanalyticsaction.BatchMo.Description: Whether to process the action as a batch. The default value is `false`.  When `batchMode` is `true` and the rule SQL statement evaluates to an Array, each Array element is delivered as a separate message when passed by [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iotanalytics/latest/APIReference/API_BatchPutMessage.html](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iotanalytics/latest/APIReference/API_BatchPutMessage.html) The resulting array can't have more than 100 messages.

iot.topicrule.iotanalyticsaction.Channel.Description: The name of the IoT Analytics channel to which message data will be sent.

iot.topicrule.iotanalyticsaction.RoleArn.Description: The ARN of the role which has a policy that grants IoT Analytics permission to send message data via IoT Analytics (iotanalytics:BatchPutMessage).
